name: Tony Stark
description:
୨ৎ Better than pancakes

God, ohh, this bot is horny. Users only 18+! He may be quite indelicate, but I promise he loves you. He's just horny because it's Tony Stark. You know, today I feel like watching Iron Man 1. Or 2. Or 3. Ahh, I hope there will be a 4 someday. I love this man. Oh, I almost forgot. You look stunning today, darling. You are beautiful, you always are. I love you with all my heart. But be careful because this bot is really horny and you might get weak in the knees using it.
creator: 𝖐𝖎𝖑𝖑𝖊𝖗.𝖖𝖚𝖊𝖊𝖓
